composite_data_element.name: TransportMeans
composite_data_element.desc: Code and/or name identifying the type of means of transport.

composite_data_element.name: DocumentOrMessageName
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of a type of document/message by code or name. Code preferred.

composite_data_element.name: PowerType
composite_data_element.desc: To specify the type of power.

composite_data_element.name: EventCategory
composite_data_element.desc: To specify the event category.

composite_data_element.name: MonetaryAmountFunctionDetail
composite_data_element.desc: To provide the detail of a monetary amount function.

composite_data_element.name: InformationCategory
composite_data_element.desc: To specify the category of information.

composite_data_element.name: InformationType
composite_data_element.desc: To specify the type of information.

composite_data_element.name: InformationDetail
composite_data_element.desc: To provide the information details.

composite_data_element.name: ProcessingIndicator
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of the processing indicator.

composite_data_element.name: PaymentTerms
composite_data_element.desc: Terms of payment information.

composite_data_element.name: EventType
composite_data_element.desc: To specify the type of event.

composite_data_element.name: Carrier
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of a carrier by code and/or by name. Code preferred.

composite_data_element.name: NationalityDetails
composite_data_element.desc: To specify a nationality.

composite_data_element.name: BillLevelIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: A sequenced collection of facetted codes used for multiple indexing purposes.

composite_data_element.name: RemunerationTypeIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of the type of a remuneration.

composite_data_element.name: ContactDetails
composite_data_element.desc: Code and/or name of a contact such as a department or employee. Code preferred.

composite_data_element.name: NameAndAddress
composite_data_element.desc: Unstructured name and address: one to five lines.

composite_data_element.name: Street
composite_data_element.desc: Street address and/or PO Box number in a structured address: one to four lines.

composite_data_element.name: EventIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: To identify an event.

composite_data_element.name: CommunicationContact
composite_data_element.desc: Communication number of a department or employee in a specified channel.

composite_data_element.name: FileIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: To identify a file.

composite_data_element.name: AccountHolderIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of an account holder by account number and/or account holder name in one or two lines. Number preferred.

composite_data_element.name: ComputerEnvironmentIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: To identify parts of a computer environment.

composite_data_element.name: PartyName
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of a transaction party by name, one to five lines. Party name may be formatted.

composite_data_element.name: PartyIdentificationDetails
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of a transaction party by code.

composite_data_element.name: MaritalStatusDetails
composite_data_element.desc: To specify the marital status of a person.

composite_data_element.name: InstitutionIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of a financial institution by code branch number, or name and name of place. Code or branch number preferred.

composite_data_element.name: AddressDetails
composite_data_element.desc: To specify the details of an address.

composite_data_element.name: FileDetails
composite_data_element.desc: To define details relevant to a file.

composite_data_element.name: TermsOfDeliveryOrTransport
composite_data_element.desc: Terms of delivery or transport code from a specified source.

composite_data_element.name: ReligionDetails
composite_data_element.desc: To specify the religion of a person.

composite_data_element.name: DocumentOrMessageIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of a document/message by its number and eventually its version or revision.

composite_data_element.name: TextReference
composite_data_element.desc: Coded reference to a standard text and its source.

composite_data_element.name: TextLiteral
composite_data_element.desc: Free text; one to five lines.

composite_data_element.name: RateDetails
composite_data_element.desc: Rate per unit and rate basis.

composite_data_element.name: PriceMultiplierInformation
composite_data_element.desc: Price multiplier and its identification.

composite_data_element.name: ValueOrRange
composite_data_element.desc: Measurement value and relevant minimum and maximum values of the measurement range.

composite_data_element.name: QuantityDetails
composite_data_element.desc: Quantity information in a transaction, qualified when relevant.

composite_data_element.name: Charge
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of a charge by code and/or by name.

composite_data_element.name: PackageType
composite_data_element.desc: Type of package by name or by code from a specified source.

composite_data_element.name: RateOrTariffClass
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of the applicable rate/tariff class.

composite_data_element.name: HazardCode
composite_data_element.desc: The identification of the dangerous goods in code.

composite_data_element.name: IdentificationNumber
composite_data_element.desc: The identification of an object.

composite_data_element.name: IdentityNumberRange
composite_data_element.desc: Goods item identification numbers, start and end of consecutively numbered range.

composite_data_element.name: Marks
composite_data_element.desc: Shipping marks on packages in free text; one to ten lines.

composite_data_element.name: Dimensions
composite_data_element.desc: Specification of the dimensions of a transportable unit.

composite_data_element.name: ItemNumberIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: Goods identification for a specified source.

composite_data_element.name: NumberAndTypeOfPackages
composite_data_element.desc: Number and type of individual parts of a shipment.

composite_data_element.name: SpecialServicesIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of a special service by a code from a specified source or by description.

composite_data_element.name: SealIssuer
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of the issuer of a seal on equipment either by code or by name.

composite_data_element.name: HazardousMaterial
composite_data_element.desc: To specify a hazardous material.

composite_data_element.name: MovementType
composite_data_element.desc: Description of type of service for movement of cargo.

composite_data_element.name: ModeOfTransport
composite_data_element.desc: Method of transport code or name. Code preferred.

composite_data_element.name: TransportIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: Code and/or name identifying the means of transport.

composite_data_element.name: DangerousGoodsShipmentFlashpoint
composite_data_element.desc: Temperature at which a vapor can be ignited as per ISO 1523/73.

composite_data_element.name: EquipmentSizeAndType
composite_data_element.desc: Code and or name identifying size and type of equipment. Code preferred.

composite_data_element.name: ChargeCategory
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of a category or a zone of charges.

composite_data_element.name: MethodOfPayment
composite_data_element.desc: Code identifying the method of payment.

composite_data_element.name: GovernmentAction
composite_data_element.desc: Function: To indicate the requirement for a specific governmental action and/or procedure or which specific procedure is valid for a specific part of the transport and cross-border transactions. (Note the red portion as change in the segment description.).

composite_data_element.name: Service
composite_data_element.desc: To identify a service (which may constitute an additional component to a basic contract).

composite_data_element.name: UndgInformation
composite_data_element.desc: Information on dangerous goods, taken from the United Nations Dangerous Goods classification.

composite_data_element.name: HazardIdentificationPlacardDetails
composite_data_element.desc: These numbers appear on the hazard identification placard required on the means of transport.

composite_data_element.name: DangerousGoodsLabel
composite_data_element.desc: Markings identifying the type of hazardous goods and similar information.

composite_data_element.name: EquipmentIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: Marks (letters/numbers) identifying equipment.

composite_data_element.name: TemperatureSetting
composite_data_element.desc: The temperature under which the goods are (to be) stored or shipped.

composite_data_element.name: CharacteristicDescription
composite_data_element.desc: To provide a description of a characteristic.

composite_data_element.name: DutyOrTaxOrFeeType
composite_data_element.desc: Code and/or name identifying duty, tax or fee.

composite_data_element.name: ProcessTypeAndDescription
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of process type and description.

composite_data_element.name: DutyOrTaxOrFeeDetail
composite_data_element.desc: Rate of duty/tax/fee applicable to commodities or of tax applicable to services.

composite_data_element.name: TestMethod
composite_data_element.desc: Specification of the test method employed.

composite_data_element.name: CustomsIdentityCodes
composite_data_element.desc: Specification of goods in terms of customs identity.

composite_data_element.name: Control
composite_data_element.desc: Control total for checking integrity of a message or part of a message.

composite_data_element.name: ItemCharacteristic
composite_data_element.desc: To provide the characteristic of the item being described.

composite_data_element.name: ItemDescription
composite_data_element.desc: Description of an item.

composite_data_element.name: QuantityDifferenceInformation
composite_data_element.desc: Information on quantity difference.

composite_data_element.name: Range
composite_data_element.desc: Range minimum and maximum limits.

composite_data_element.name: SequenceInformation
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of a sequence and source for sequencing.

composite_data_element.name: ProductGroup
composite_data_element.desc: To give product group information.

composite_data_element.name: TunnelRestriction
composite_data_element.desc: To specify a restriction for transport through tunnels.

composite_data_element.name: TransportService
composite_data_element.desc: To identify a transport service.

composite_data_element.name: PatternDescription
composite_data_element.desc: Shipment, delivery or production interval pattern and timing.

composite_data_element.name: InsuranceCoverType
composite_data_element.desc: To provide the insurance cover type.

composite_data_element.name: InsuranceCoverDetails
composite_data_element.desc: To provide the insurance cover details.

composite_data_element.name: SalesChannelIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of sales channel for marketing data, sales, forecast, planning...

composite_data_element.name: InformationRequest
composite_data_element.desc: To specify the information requested in a responding message.

composite_data_element.name: ExcessTransportationInformation
composite_data_element.desc: To provide details of reason for, and responsibility for, use of transportation other than normally utilized.

composite_data_element.name: PackageTypeIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of the form in which goods are described.

composite_data_element.name: PercentageDetails
composite_data_element.desc: Percentage relating to a specified basis.

composite_data_element.name: MeasurementDetails
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of measurement type.

composite_data_element.name: DocumentOrMessageDetails
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of document/message by number, status, source and/or language.

composite_data_element.name: CurrencyDetails
composite_data_element.desc: The usage to which a currency relates.

composite_data_element.name: Reference
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of a reference.

composite_data_element.name: DateOrTimeOrPeriod
composite_data_element.desc: Date and/or time, or period relevant to the specified date/time/period type.

composite_data_element.name: LanguageDetails
composite_data_element.desc: To identify a language.

composite_data_element.name: PriceInformation
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of price type, price and related details.

composite_data_element.name: SizeDetails
composite_data_element.desc: Information about the number of observations.

composite_data_element.name: SampleLocationDetails
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of location within the specimen, from which the sample was taken.

composite_data_element.name: TestReason
composite_data_element.desc: To identify the reason for the test as specified.

composite_data_element.name: MonetaryAmount
composite_data_element.desc: Amount of goods or services stated as a monetary amount in a specified currency.

composite_data_element.name: LocationIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of a location by code or name.

composite_data_element.name: RelatedLocationOneIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: Identification the first related location by code or name.

composite_data_element.name: BusinessFunction
composite_data_element.desc: To specify a business reason.

composite_data_element.name: Instruction
composite_data_element.desc: To specify an instruction.

composite_data_element.name: NumberOfUnitDetails
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of number of units and its purpose.

composite_data_element.name: HandlingInstructions
composite_data_element.desc: Instruction for the handling of goods, products or articles in shipment, storage etc.

composite_data_element.name: PurposeOfConveyanceCall
composite_data_element.desc: Description of the purpose of the call of the conveyance.

composite_data_element.name: FrequencyDetails
composite_data_element.desc: Number of samples collected per specified unit of measure.

composite_data_element.name: StatisticalDetails
composite_data_element.desc: Specifications related to statistical measurements.

composite_data_element.name: CommodityOrRateDetail
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of commodity/rates.

composite_data_element.name: PackagingDetails
composite_data_element.desc: Packaging level and details, terms and conditions.

composite_data_element.name: ReturnablePackageDetails
composite_data_element.desc: Indication of responsibility for payment and load contents of returnable packages.

composite_data_element.name: DutyOrTaxOrFeeAccountDetail
composite_data_element.desc: Indication of account reference for duties, taxes and/or fees.

composite_data_element.name: PaymentInstructionDetails
composite_data_element.desc: Indication of method of payment employed or to be employed.

composite_data_element.name: ContractAndCarriageCondition
composite_data_element.desc: To identify a contract and carriage condition.

composite_data_element.name: TransportPriority
composite_data_element.desc: To indicate the priority of requested transport service.

composite_data_element.name: AgreementTypeIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of specific agreement type by code or name.

composite_data_element.name: IndexIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: To identify an index.

composite_data_element.name: IndexValue
composite_data_element.desc: To identify the value of an index.

composite_data_element.name: MonetaryAmountFunction
composite_data_element.desc: To identify the function of a monetary amount.

composite_data_element.name: RequirementOrConditionIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: To identify the specific rule/condition requirement.

composite_data_element.name: BankOperation
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of a bank operation by code.

composite_data_element.name: AllowanceOrChargeInformation
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of allowance/charge information by number and/or code.

composite_data_element.name: RelatedLocationTwoIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of second related location by code or name.

composite_data_element.name: RateOrTariffClassDetail
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of the applicable rate/tariff class.

composite_data_element.name: Status
composite_data_element.desc: To specify a status.

composite_data_element.name: StatusReason
composite_data_element.desc: To specify the reason for a status.

composite_data_element.name: PhysicalOrLogicalStateInformation
composite_data_element.desc: To give information in coded or clear text form on the physical or logical state.

composite_data_element.name: PriorityDetails
composite_data_element.desc: To indicate a priority.

composite_data_element.name: AccountIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of an account.

composite_data_element.name: AccountingJournalIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of an accounting journal.

composite_data_element.name: AccountingEntryTypeDetails
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of the type of entry included in an accounting journal.

composite_data_element.name: StatusCategory
composite_data_element.desc: To specify the category of the status.

composite_data_element.name: ErrorPointDetails
composite_data_element.desc: Indication of the point of error in a message.

composite_data_element.name: CodeSetIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: To identify a code set.

composite_data_element.name: NatureOfCargo
composite_data_element.desc: Rough classification of a type of cargo.

composite_data_element.name: MessageIdentifier
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of the message.

composite_data_element.name: ArrayCellDetails
composite_data_element.desc: To contain the data for a contiguous set of cells in an array.

composite_data_element.name: PositionIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: To identify the position of an object in a structure containing the object.

composite_data_element.name: ArrayStructureIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: The identification of an array structure.

composite_data_element.name: ValueListIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: The identification of a coded or non coded value list.

composite_data_element.name: DataSetIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: The identification of a data set.

composite_data_element.name: FootnoteSetIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: The identification of a set of footnotes.

composite_data_element.name: FootnoteIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: The identification of a footnote.

composite_data_element.name: StatisticalConceptIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: The identification of a statistical concept.

composite_data_element.name: StructureComponentIdentification
composite_data_element.desc: The identification of a structure component.

composite_data_element.name: QuestionDetails
composite_data_element.desc: To specify a question.

composite_data_element.name: ResponseDetails
composite_data_element.desc: To specify a response to a question, in code or text.

composite_data_element.name: SafetySection
composite_data_element.desc: To identify the safety section to which information relates.

composite_data_element.name: AdditionalSafetyInformation
composite_data_element.desc: To identify additional safety information.

composite_data_element.name: NameComponentDetails
composite_data_element.desc: To specify a name component.

composite_data_element.name: AddressUsage
composite_data_element.desc: To describe the usage of an address.

composite_data_element.name: PersonInheritedCharacteristicDetails
composite_data_element.desc: To specify an inherited characteristic of a person.

composite_data_element.name: CountrySubdivisionDetails
composite_data_element.desc: To specify a country subdivision, such as state, canton, county, prefecture.

composite_data_element.name: PremiumCalculationComponent
composite_data_element.desc: To identify the component affecting premium calculation.

composite_data_element.name: TypeOfDamage
composite_data_element.desc: To specify the type of damage to an object.

composite_data_element.name: DamageArea
composite_data_element.desc: To specify where the damage is on an object.

composite_data_element.name: TypeOfUnitOrComponent
composite_data_element.desc: To identify the type of unit/component of an object (e.g. lock, door, tyre).

composite_data_element.name: ComponentMaterial
composite_data_element.desc: To identify the material of which a component is composed (e.g. steel, plastics).

composite_data_element.name: DamageSeverity
composite_data_element.desc: To specify the severity of damage to an object.

composite_data_element.name: Action
composite_data_element.desc: To indicate an action which has been taken or is to be taken (e.g. in relation to a certain object).

composite_data_element.name: TypeOfMarking
composite_data_element.desc: Specification of the type of marking that reflects the method that was used and the conventions adhered to for marking (e.g. of packages).

composite_data_element.name: ClinicalInterventionDetails
composite_data_element.desc: To specify a clinical intervention.

composite_data_element.name: Sub
composite_data_element.desc: To provide an indication that a segment or segment group is used to contain sub-line or sub-line item information and to optionally enable the sub-line to be identified.

composite_data_element.name: ProcessIdentificationDetails
composite_data_element.desc: To identify the details of a specific process.

composite_data_element.name: ResultDetails
composite_data_element.desc: To specify a value.

composite_data_element.name: ClinicalInformationDetails
composite_data_element.desc: To specify an item of clinical information.

composite_data_element.name: CertaintyDetails
composite_data_element.desc: To specify the certainty.

composite_data_element.name: DosageDetails
composite_data_element.desc: To specify a dosage.

composite_data_element.name: AttendeeCategory
composite_data_element.desc: To specify the category of the attendee.

composite_data_element.name: AttendanceAdmissionDetails
composite_data_element.desc: To specify type of admission.

composite_data_element.name: AttendanceDischargeDetails
composite_data_element.desc: To specify type of discharge.

composite_data_element.name: OrganisationClassificationDetail
composite_data_element.desc: To specify details regarding the class of an organisation.

composite_data_element.name: MeasurementUnitDetails
composite_data_element.desc: To specify a measurement unit.

composite_data_element.name: PartiesToInstruction
composite_data_element.desc: Identify the sending and receiving parties of the instruction.

composite_data_element.name: StatusOfInstruction
composite_data_element.desc: Provides information regarding the status of an instruction.

composite_data_element.name: RiskObjectType
composite_data_element.desc: Specification of a type of risk object.

composite_data_element.name: RiskObjectSub
composite_data_element.desc: To provide identification details for a risk object sub-type.

composite_data_element.name: ErrorSegmentPointDetails
composite_data_element.desc: To indicate the exact segment location of an application error within a message.

composite_data_element.name: ChargeOrAllowanceAccount
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of the account for charge or allowance.

composite_data_element.name: CharacteristicValue
composite_data_element.desc: To provide the value of a characteristic.

composite_data_element.name: ApplicationErrorDetail
composite_data_element.desc: Code assigned by the recipient of a message to indicate a data validation error condition.

composite_data_element.name: Relationship
composite_data_element.desc: Identification and/or description of a relationship.

composite_data_element.name: MembershipCategory
composite_data_element.desc: Identification and/or description of a membership category for a member of a scheme or group.

composite_data_element.name: MembershipStatus
composite_data_element.desc: Code and/or description of membership status.

composite_data_element.name: MembershipLevel
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of a membership level.

composite_data_element.name: EmploymentCategory
composite_data_element.desc: Code and/or description of an employment category.

composite_data_element.name: QualificationClassification
composite_data_element.desc: Qualification classification description and/or code. This specifies the trade, skill, professional or similar qualification category.

composite_data_element.name: Occupation
composite_data_element.desc: Description of an occupation.

composite_data_element.name: ContributionType
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of the type of a contribution to a scheme or group.

composite_data_element.name: AttributeType
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of the type of attribute.

composite_data_element.name: AttributeDetail
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of the attribute related to an entity.

composite_data_element.name: ReasonForChange
composite_data_element.desc: Code and/or description of the reason for a change.

composite_data_element.name: FormulaComplexity
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of the complexity of a formula.

composite_data_element.name: ClauseName
composite_data_element.desc: Identification of a clause in coded or clear form.

composite_data_element.name: ProvisoType
composite_data_element.desc: Specification of the proviso type in coded or clear form.

composite_data_element.name: ProvisoCalculation
composite_data_element.desc: Specification of the proviso calculation in coded or clear form.

composite_data_element.name: ApplicabilityType
composite_data_element.desc: Specification of the applicability type in coded or clear form.

composite_data_element.name: BasisType
composite_data_element.desc: Specification of the basis in coded or clear form.

composite_data_element.name: PeriodDetail
composite_data_element.desc: Specification of the period detail in coded or clear form.
